innateAbility.name: Retribution
innateAbility.description: Attacks now fire traces of her soul that punch the enemy on contact, making Shen akin to a melee unit with her attacks having the same attack range-type behavior.Shen benefits from both melee and ranged attack type bonuses.

abilities.name: Magic Missile
abilities.description: Fires a magic missile at an enemy unit, stunning and dealing damage.

abilities.name: Wave of Terror
abilities.description: Lets loose a wicked cry, weakening the armor of enemies and giving vision of the path ahead.

abilities.name: Vengeance Aura
abilities.description: Shen's presence increases the damage of nearby friendly heroes.

abilities.name: Nether Swap
abilities.description: Instantaneously swaps positions with eithier a targeted allied unit or targeted enemy unit, and interrupts their channeling abilities.If the swapped unit is an enemy unit, the reposition deals damage to the affected enemy unit.

talents.right: +25% Wave of Terror Attack Damage/Armor Change
